extDescription.message: Summarize articles, blogs, and selected text with OpenAI.

popupEmpty.message: Open Trimly AI on a readable page to generate a summary.

popupReady.message: Choose a language and press Trimly to generate a summary.

settingsLanguageLengthHintSummary.message: The selected language controls the output language. For lengths other than Full, the app summarizes the text.

settingsLanguageLengthHintFull.message: The selected language controls the output language. When Full is selected, the app does not summarize; it fully translates the text.

historyDetailEmpty.message: Select a summary to view details.

errorNoApiKey.message: Please enter your API key in settings.

errorInvalidApiKey.message: Invalid API key. Please check your key.

errorRateLimit.message: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait a moment.

errorNetwork.message: Connection error. Check your internet connection.

errorNoContent.message: No readable content was found. Select text and try again.

errorContentTrimmed.message: The page was very long, so only the first part was summarized.

errorTimeout.message: The request timed out. Please try again.

errorUnknown.message: Something went wrong while generating the summary.

readerEmptyBody.message: Generate a summary from the popup and use the Open in new tab action.
